title: Social worker
salary_range: Competitive hourly wage based on Finnish collective agreements.
jobcontent:
The position will be located in the temporary housing service and the Addiction Hospital. The temporary housing service is mobile independent work. It currently includes an emergency accommodation service as group accommodation for those without right of residence. In addition to this, the service includes scattered apartments in Espoo, Helsinki and Vantaa, where people who have experienced intimate partner violence live in temporary supported housing. The drug addiction hospital is Finland's only hospital specializing in the treatment of drug and mental health patients. We have a 24-hour medical emergency. The drug addiction hospital currently has a detoxification and institutional rehabilitation unit. Gambling addicts are also treated in our unit. In addition, we offer assessment of work and functional capacity for substance abuse and mental health patients.

We are now looking for a social worker for a temporary position from 13.4.-31.12.2026 (start possible also according to the contract), whose tasks will be located in the temporary housing service and in the drug addiction hospital.

Main duties

In this position, you work as a social worker for temporary housing services. The work is independent and includes mobile work that can be taken home. Key tasks include: network cooperation, mapping and support of the customer's social situation, and guidance in managing social issues and working with intimate relationships and domestic violence. Knowledge of the English language and the use of your own car are essential. In the addiction hospital, you work as a member of a multi-professional work group, and the main tasks are: Mapping the social situation of clients and support for managing social issues during the treatment period, Self-employed work, Network work and group supervision.

What do we require?

We require Socionomist AMK education. The employee must also commit to training on domestic violence work if he has not completed training on domestic violence work. Experience of independent work with take-home services and intimate partner violence and crisis work is considered an advantage. The employee must have up-to-date knowledge and skills about the process of applying for apartments.

What do we offer the employee?

We offer an interesting job description and orientation to the job. The assignment may continue after the fixed period. The position is placed in the salary group G23D of the TES of the private social service industry, in addition to which personal and task-specific bonuses are paid according to the salary criteria of A-klinikka Oy, depending on competence and experience and the work task. This assignment includes a language supplement. Please submit your application as soon as possible, because you can be selected for the position already during the application period. Earlier applications will be considered. The task starts on 27.4 or according to the agreement.

title: Electrical line Installers and repairers, electrical Mechanics and fitters.
salary_range: Competitive hourly wage based on Finnish collective agreements.
jobcontent:
Full-time job with the possibility of overtime and weekend work. The work includes the installation of electrical cables on ships under construction. The work is done at the shipyard. The work is physically demanding and heavy. Working hours 7:00 a.m. - 3:30 p.m. Mon-Fri

The best way to get in touch is by email.
translated_content:
Electrical line Installers and repairers, electrical Mechanics and fitters.

Full-time job with the possibility of overtime and weekend work. The work includes the installation of electrical cables on ships under construction. The work is done at the shipyard. The work is physically demanding and heavy. Working hours 7:00 a.m. - 3:30 p.m. Mon-Fri

The best way to get in touch is by email.

title: Combination vehicle driver, Henkilötyö Jokinen Oy, uusimaa, Vantaa
jobapply_link: mailto:info@henkilotyo.fi?subject=Application for the Job - Yhdistelmäajoneuvonkuljettaja, Henkilötyö Jokinen Oy, uusimaa, Vantaa
jobcontent:
We are hiring a semi-trailer driver for our car for a permanent day job. Driving arrangement in Tikkurilanti in Vantaa at the DSV terminal. The work will start as soon as possible/immediately. The driving area is mainly the capital region and surrounding areas. But sometimes you go further. After all, you are professional and have sufficient work experience in the field. You know the capital region and the ports. The car is a 3-axle Volvo. You get to use a clean car and a comfortable work environment. You will be guided to the work and receive the necessary orientation.

As a requirement:

- Valid professional qualification
 
- Driver card (Digital card)
 
- Experience in driving piece goods and tying down loads
 
- You are a reliable and responsible driver
 
- A professional in the field
 

In favor of:

- ADR license preferred (Unit goods)
 

If you are interested in the position, call or send a job application by e-mail. We'll be in touch.

We belong to the Vastuu Group Reliable partner circle. This obligates us to take care of our company's and employer's obligations accordingly. We take care of our employees and also help them survive in their profession. You will always receive your salary according to the collective agreement. Also occupational health services, work clothes and equipment.

info@henkilotyo.fi Phone: 0408094433 Pertti Jokinen

title: Lead Branch Manager, SIXT Tampere
salary_range: Palkkaus 2500-2700 € riippuen valitun kokemuksesta ja osaamisesta.
what_we_expect: monitor the provision of the service
comply with the company's level of requirements
communicate with the customer service department
what_we_offer: An influential role in SIXT's operations in Finland
The opportunity to develop operations and the team
Comprehensive orientation and the support and development opportunities of the international group
Responsible and versatile work in a growing organization
If you are interested, apply right away and we will start the interviews if during the application period. The position will be filled when a suitable person is found.
jobcontent:
**Do you want to play a key role in developing SIXT's operations in Finland?**

We are looking for an enthusiastic and goal-oriented Lead Branch Manager to be responsible for managing the offices in Tampere. In this role, you lead and motivate the team to succeed, ensure a first-class customer experience and advance business goals efficiently and with high quality.

The Lead Branch Manager is responsible for SIXT Tampere's comprehensive operational management, personnel and performance. The task includes personnel management, ensuring customer service, managing fleet availability and business development. You make sure that the operation is efficient, profitable and in accordance with the company's standards.

**Key areas of responsibility**

- You ensure the day-to-day smooth operational functioning of the branches in accordance with SIXT SOP standards (rentals, returns, inventory management).
 
- You lead and monitor sales and focus on developing profitable additional sales and producing an excellent customer experience.
 
- You monitor quality and results, and plan measures to achieve goals.
 
- You ensure that the vehicles are serviced and ready for use.
 
- You take care of the correct handling of customer complaints and maintaining customer satisfaction.
 
- You are responsible for the implementation of customer service, quality and additional sales training in accordance with Transporent group and SIXT standards.
 
- You lead and develop the Tampere team: recruitment, orientation, development discussions and daily coaching work.
 
- You work in close cooperation with the Head of RAC Finland and take care of other tasks assigned by the employer.
 
- You work in close cooperation with internal support functions (finance, HR, fleet management, marketing), ensuring efficient and smooth operational activities.
 
- You maintain working relationships with external partners, such as maintenance shops, laundry services and other service providers, and ensure the high quality and availability of services.
 

**We expect from you**

- Customer-oriented and solution-oriented approach
 
- Strategic and analytical thinking ability
 
- Strong decision-making and problem-solving skills
 
- Ability to work collaboratively and lead Teams
 
- Excellent oral and written communication
 
- Evidence of customer experience management and/or customer service frontline duties
 
- Experience in leading a team and achieving goals
 
- Ability to manage multiple tasks in a fast-paced environment
 
- Fluent Finnish and English language skills
 
- Good IT skills
 
- B driver's license
 

**What do we offer?**

- An influential role in SIXT's operations in Finland
 
- The opportunity to develop operations and the team
 
- Comprehensive orientation and the support and development opportunities of the international group
 
- Responsible and versatile work in a growing organization
 

If you are interested, apply right away and we will start the interviews if during the application period. The position will be filled when a suitable person is found.

_SIXT Autovuokraamo serves travelers who appreciate smooth movement and high-quality cars in several locations from Helsinki to Kittilä. In our selection you will find vehicles for different needs, from compact city cars to spacious family cars and premium models. SIXT is known for its friendly customer service and high customer satisfaction, which makes us a reliable choice for both business and leisure travelers._

**Please note that we only process applications sent through the recruitment portal in the application process.**

title: Dock worker, construction cleaner
what_we_expect: clean the floors of the building
jobcontent:
We have jobs available for shipyard workers/construction cleaners who are not afraid of hard work at the Rauma shipyard! A good command of the Finnish language is an absolute prerequisite. Previous work experience is not required, you will do well with a brisk attitude! An occupational safety card is considered an advantage.

Applications and inquiries by e-mail to juha.janisoja@kipkapteam.fi

KipKap Team is happy to employ young, open-minded and motivated employees.
We are a good-natured and close-knit group that spends time with each other outside of working hours as well. We want to engage employees by paying a competitive salary and managing the employer's obligations properly,

Juha.janisoja@kipkapteam.fi
